title: KKR Carve-Out Is a Recipe for Remorse
title_cn: KKR 的剥离会带来悔恨
summary: One of buyout barons’ most sought-after targets is the “corporate carve-out.” This is the purchase of a poorly performing division of a sprawling conglomerate on the assumption that private equity can run it better. KKR & Co.’s grim experience surgically removing a food business from Unilever Plc should end any illusions that such deals always offer a quick buck.

title: Keir Starmer Delivers Speech to Save His Premiership (Full Remarks)
title_cn: 凯尔·斯塔默发表演讲以挽救他的英超生涯（完整评论）
summary: Prime Minister Keir Starmer has delivered a last-ditch effort to save his premiership this morning, with a politically charged address designed to hold back calls for a change in leadership atop Britain’s governing Labour Party. During the speech, he reiterated his message from Friday that he won’t walk away and risk “plunging the country into chaos.” The prime minister also addressed questions about his leadership. “I know people are frustrated with me,” he said. “I know I have doubters, and I know I need to prove them wrong.” Starmer also vowed to put Britain “at the heart of Europe” and announced the nationalisation of British Steel. (Source: Bloomberg)

She speaks on Bloomberg Television as US President Donald Trump rejected Iran’s latest response to his proposal to end the war in the Middle East. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: The Bank of England's Megan Greene on Monetary Policy in a World of Supply Side Shocks | Odd Lots
title_cn: 英国央行行长梅根·格林 (Megan Greene) 谈供给侧冲击世界中的货币政策零股
summary: Ever since Covid, central banks around the world have had the same problem. They have tools that are designed to modulate demand, but so many challenges have involved the supply side of the economy. Whether we're talking about supply chain disruptions, the war in Ukraine, and now the war in Iran, these are all issues for which monetary policy is of limited value. Of course, the temptation is to "look through" these issues, recognizing the fact that these disruptions don't say much about the actual underlying state of the economy. On this episode we speak with Megan Greene, an external member of the Monetary Policy Committee at the Bank of England. We talk about the compounding effects of all these shocks (including the trade war), how she's thinking about the first- and second-order effects of each one, and why, for now, despite the underlying weakness of the UK economy, she remains squarely focused on the risks of higher inflation. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: JPMorgan Says Equities at All-Time Highs 'Make Sense'

summary: Grace Peters, global investment strategy co-head at JPMorgan Private Bank, discusses artificial intelligence investment, inflation risks and portfolio diversification. "We want to be in there for the equity bull market that we still see ahead, but we do think that there's still portfolio resilience that needed to be added to capitalize on some of these trends," Peters tells Bloomberg Television. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: What If AI’s Biggest Impact Isn’t Jobs, But Minds?
title_cn: 如果人工智能最大的影响不是工作而是思想怎么办？
summary: In this episode of Merryn Talks Money, Merryn Somerset Webb speaks to Tom Slater, manager of Scottish Mortgage Investment Trust and partner at Baillie Gifford, about his provocative paper, “AI Isn’t Coming for Your Job. It’s Coming for Your Mind,” and why the real risk may be a world that looks more productive while quietly losing the judgement, learning and expertise that make progress possible. They also discuss what that means for the future workforce and smart investing.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Why Stablecoins Are Crypto’s Real Payments Test
title_cn: 为什么稳定币是加密货币的真正支付测试
summary: Every year, Filipinos working overseas send $35 billion back home — and a growing share of those transfers are being executed using stablecoins. The blockchain technology promises to make cross-border payments cheaper and nearly instantaneous, offering an alternative to traditional remittance channels. But even though the opportunity could be huge, stablecoins remain a tiny part of the global payments system today. With the GENIUS Act set to take effect and banks eyeing the space, the race to scale is just getting started. (Source: Bloomberg)

summary: The Trump family media group posted a net drop of $405.9 million in the first quarter, largely driven by unrealized losses in cryptocurrencies held by the company.

title: ECB’s Escrivá Says AI Risks Prompt Finance Infrastructure Review
title_cn: 欧洲央行 Escrivá 表示人工智能风险促使金融基础设施审查
summary: Central banks must review the resilience of financial infrastructure given the rise of artificial intelligence, as well as defend their role as the ultimate guarantor against risks posed by stablecoins, said European Central Bank Governing Council member José Luis Escrivá.

title: Kenya Plans Taxes on Phones, Banking Fees to Raise $1 Billion
title_cn: 肯尼亚计划通过电话税和银行费用筹集 10 亿美元
summary: Kenya plans taxes on mobile phones and banking fees to help raise nearly $1 billion in revenue in an effort to trim the nation’s fiscal deficit to its lowest in a decade and tackle debt challenges.

title: Chinese Export Growth Rebounds as War Fails to Curb Trade
title_cn: 战争未能遏制贸易，中国出口增长反弹
summary: China’s export growth rebounded more than expected despite disruptions to shipping caused by the war in Iran, as trade volumes swell due to an investment boom in artificial intelligence.

title: Starmer Vows to Prove Critics Wrong in Speech to Save Job
title_cn: 斯塔默誓言要证明批评者的言论是错误的以挽救工作
summary: UK prime minister Keir Starmer said he would contest any leadership challenge, as he battled to save his premiership in a speech that appeared to do little to subdue the rebellions brewing within his party.

title: Latvia to Work on Drone Defense with Ukraine, Says Foreign Minister
title_cn: 拉脱维亚外交部长表示，拉脱维亚将与乌克兰合作开展无人机防御工作
summary: Latvia will work with Ukraine and its allies to better handle defense against drones that stray into its territory, Latvian Foreign Minister Baiba Braze said, after two drones crashed last week in the country’s east, forcing Defense Minister Andris Spruds to resign late on Sunday. Braze spoke to BTV's Oliver Crook on Monday ahead of the Foreign Affairs Council in Brussels. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Lithuania 'Welcomes' US Troops, Says Foreign Minister
title_cn: 立陶宛外交部长表示“欢迎”美军
summary: Lithuanian Foreign Minister Kestutis Budrys said that Vilnius welcomes US troops “wherever they are” on the continent, though said the closer those forces are to Russia the more effective their role in deterrence. He made the comments in an interview with BTV's Oliver Crook on Monday morning, ahead of the Foreign Affairs Council in Brussels. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Starmer's UK Leadership Woes Add to Gilt Risks, Rabobank Says
title_cn: 荷兰合作银行表示，斯塔默的英国领导困境加剧了金边债券的风险
summary: Jane Foley, head of FX strategy at Rabobank, discusses the outlook for gilt markets as UK Prime Minister attempts to persuade the Labour Party that he is the right person to lead it following last week's heavy losses in local election results. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Hungary’s New Government Risks EU Fight Over Russian Energy
title_cn: 匈牙利新政府面临欧盟争夺俄罗斯能源的风险
summary: The new government of Hungarian Prime Minister Peter Magyar is risking a standoff with the European Union over a plan to stick with Russian energy purchases.

title: Danish Liberal Leader Gets Two Weeks to Try to Form a Government
title_cn: 丹麦自由党领袖有两周时间尝试组建政府
summary: The head of Denmark’s Liberal party said he has a two-week deadline to form the country’s new government, after record-long talks were thrown off track last week.

title: The Unlikely Scandal Tripping Up Ramaphosa
title_cn: 拉马福萨的不可思议的丑闻
summary: A scandal has resurfaced involving a concealed hoard of dollars at the South African president’s ranch.

title: UK's Starmer Says He Will Prove His 'Doubters' Wrong
title_cn: 英国斯塔默表示他将证明他的“怀疑者”是错误的
summary:
UK Prime Minister Keir Starmer, in a speech aimed at re-setting his premiership, says he takes responsibility for the governing Labour Party's performance in last week's local elections. "I know I have my doubters, and I know I need to prove them wrong, and I will," Starmer adds.
 (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Duterte Ouster Bid Hits Wall as Allies Seize Philippine Senate
title_cn: 杜特尔特的罢黜提议陷入困境，盟友夺取菲律宾参议院
summary: Allies of Philippines’ Vice President Sara Duterte took power in the Senate on Monday, giving them control over the chamber that will conduct her impeachment trial as the House of Representatives voted to move forward with the bid to oust her.

title: Stark Class Divides Are Deepening Peru’s Electoral Chaos
title_cn: 严重的阶级鸿沟正在加深秘鲁的选举混乱
summary: Fewer than 15,000 votes stand between a leftist representing Peru’s impoverished communities and a conservative hotel magnate who represents the capital city as they compete for the final spot in June’s presidential runoff.

title: Another Qatar LNG Shipment Approaches Hormuz, Bound for Pakistan
title_cn: 又一批卡塔尔液化天然气接近霍尔木兹，发往巴基斯坦
summary: Another tanker loaded with liquefied natural gas from Qatar is nearing the Strait of Hormuz, after Pakistan negotiated with Iran for the passage of several shipments through the chokepoint.

title: Jerome Powell: The Fed Chair Who Fought Back
title_cn: 杰罗姆·鲍威尔：反击的美联储主席
summary: Jerome Powell led the Fed through a pandemic and economic shutdown, but it's his resistance to political pressure that will shape his legacy. Bloomberg's Amara Omeokwe explains. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Thai Opposition Seeks Court Ruling on $12 Billion Borrowing Plan
title_cn: 泰国反对派寻求法院对 120 亿美元借款计划做出裁决
summary: Thailand’s main opposition parties are seeking a court ruling on the legality of Prime Minister Anutin Charnvirakul’s plan to borrow 400 billion baht ($12 billion) to deal with the fallout of the Middle East conflict and ease the cost-of-living crisis.

title: Trump Aims to Press Xi Over China’s Approach to War in Iran
title_cn: 特朗普旨在就中国对伊朗战争的态度向习近平施压
summary: President Donald Trump is expected to press President Xi Jinping over China’s approach to Iran and hammer out details on a new board of trade when they meet this week in Beijing, senior US officials said Sunday, hours before China confirmed the state visit.

title: US Army Identifies Soldier Found Dead During Morocco Exercise
title_cn: 美国陆军确认摩洛哥演习期间遇难士兵身份
summary: The body of one of two US Army service members who went missing in Morocco during a military exercise has been recovered and identified, the US Army said.

title: Starmer’s UK Rivals Circle Before Make-or-Break Reset Speech
title_cn: 斯塔默的英国竞争对手在成败重置演讲之前围观
summary: Prime Minister Keir Starmer’s political problems have likely grown too big to solve with a single speech. For now, he will try to forestall an immediate challenge to his job.

title: US, Iran Wrangle Over Terms of Deal to End War and Reopen Hormuz
title_cn: 美国和伊朗就结束战争和重新开放霍尔木兹海峡的协议条款争论不休
summary: The US and Iran remain far apart on a framework to end their war and reopen the Strait of Hormuz, with President Donald Trump calling the Islamic Republic’s reply to his proposed peace plan unworkable.

title: Latvia and Lithuania Say They’d Welcome More US Troops
title_cn: 拉脱维亚和立陶宛表示欢迎更多美军
summary: The foreign ministers of Latvia and Lithuania said their countries would be ready to host more US soldiers after the administration of President Donald Trump announced it will withdraw thousands of troops from Germany.

title: Modi Urges Indians to Limit Fuel Use, Protect Forex Reserves
title_cn: 莫迪敦促印度人限制燃料使用，保护外汇储备
summary: Indian Prime Minister Narendra Modi appealed to citizens to cut fuel use and limit travel as rising oil prices from the Iran war threaten to widen the nation’s import bill and strain foreign-exchange reserves.

title: Seoul Condemns Strike on Vessel in Hormuz as Probe Continues
title_cn: 调查仍在继续，首尔谴责霍尔木兹船舶袭击事件
summary: South Korea strongly condemned what it described as an attack on a civilian cargo vessel in the Strait of Hormuz after a government investigation found the ship was struck by unidentified objects, though it stopped short of assigning blame.

title: Iran War: Trump Rejects Iran Latest Offer & Trump-Xi Summit | Daybreak Europe 5/11/2026
title_cn: 伊朗战争：特朗普拒绝伊朗最新提议和特习峰会|欧洲黎明 2026 年 5 月 11 日
summary:
Bloomberg Daybreak Europe is your essential morning viewing to stay ahead. 

On today's show, US President Donald Trump and Iran have rejected each other’s latest peace proposals to end the 10-week conflict as the two sides struggle to maintain a fragile ceasefire.”

Beijing has officially announced the date of Donald Trump's state visit this week, publicly green-lighting the first US presidential trip to China in nearly a decade. President Trump will meet Xi Jinping on Thursday.

And the UK Prime Minister Keir Starmer will make a last-ditch effort to save his premiership on Monday morning with a politically charged address designed to hold back calls for a change in leadership atop Britain’s governing Labour Party.

Today's guest: Joe Twyman, Deltapoll, Co-Founder; Freya Beamish, TS Lombard, Chief Economist; Baiba Braže, Latvian Foreign Minister. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: South Korean Finance Minister Says Growth to Exceed 2% This Year
title_cn: 韩国财长表示今年经济增长将超过 2%
summary: South Korean Finance Minister Koo Yun Cheol said he expects the country’s economic growth to exceed 2% this year, supported by surging global demand for semiconductors.

title: Hungary Won’t Blackmail EU With Veto, New Foreign Minister Says
title_cn: 新外长表示匈牙利不会用否决权勒索欧盟
summary: Hungary will no longer wield its veto on European Union policy as an instrument of blackmail and will work to win back the trust of EU and NATO partners, new Foreign Minister Anita Orban said.

title: Starmer’s Resignation ‘Inevitable’: Pollster Joe Twyman
title_cn: 民意调查专家乔·特怀曼：斯塔默的辞职“不可避免”
summary: Joe Twyman, co-founder of the public opinion consultancy Deltapoll says UK Prime Minister Keir Starmer’s resignation seems inevitable “at some time because the weight of inertia is simply so strong and the performance in the council elections was so difficult”. Labour suffered a sweeping defeat in local elections on Thursday. Twyman says the results set out “in black and white” how difficult the situation is for the ruling Labour Party. Twyman says none of the front runners to replace Starmer “r

title: Angolan President Seeks New Ruling-Party Term, Jornal Reports
title_cn: 日报报道，安哥拉总统寻求新的执政党任期
summary: Angolan leader João Lourenço informed the ruling Popular Movement for the Liberation of Angola that he plans to seek another term as party chief before his second presidential term ends in 2027, Jornal de Angola reported.

title: Ships’ Signals Go Haywire as Hormuz Strait Tensions Escalate
title_cn: 霍尔木兹海峡紧张局势升级，船舶信号失控
summary: Geolocation data for some ships in the Persian Gulf showed locations and speeds that defied logic, pointing to an increase in signal interference following fresh attacks by Iran on neighboring countries.

title: Preview Of Keir Starmer's Make Or Break Speech
title_cn: 凯尔·斯塔默 (Keir Starmer) 的成败演讲预览
summary: Prime Minister Keir Starmer's political problems have likely grown too big to solve with a single speech. For now, he will try to forestall an immediate challenge to his job. Starmer will make a last-ditch effort to save his premiership on Monday morning with a politically charged address designed to hold back calls for a change in leadership atop Britain's governing Labour Party.  James Woolcock joins Stephen Carroll and Caroline Hepker on Bloomberg Radio with the details. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: New Zealand PM Luxon Rules Out Grand Coalition With Labour
title_cn: 新西兰总理卢克森排除与工党组成大联盟的可能性
summary: New Zealand Prime Minister Christopher Luxon has ruled out a grand coalition between his National Party and the main opposition Labour Party after November’s election.

title: Trump Rejects New Iran Peace Offer as ‘Totally Unacceptable’
title_cn: 特朗普拒绝伊朗新的和平提议，称其“完全不可接受”
summary: President Donald Trump and Iran rejected each other’s latest peace proposals to end the 10-week conflict as the two sides struggle to maintain a fragile ceasefire. Bloomberg's Joumanna Bercetche reports from Dubai. (Source: Bloomberg)
